products.title: Leandra in Red Satin
products.description: The Leandra — whose design was inspired by muse, Leandra Medine — is an update to the Chelsea style, with a 35 mm kitten heel. With an elongated point toe and distinctive V-shaped T-strap reminiscent of Mary Janes, the sleek cut out silhouette is a sharp finish to tailoring and feminine attire alike, fastening at the ankle with a delicate buckled strap.

products.title: Loop Heel in Black Satin
products.description: An asymmetrical loop creates a ribbon-like effect across the top of the foot while slim straps secure the ankle. A slightly flared 75mm heel provides optimal comfort.

products.title: Loop Heel in Black Nappa
products.description: An asymmetrical loop creates a ribbon-like effect across the top of the foot while slim straps secure the ankle. A slightly flared 75mm heel provides optimal comfort.

products.title: Bari in Tan Plongé Nappa
products.description: An evolution of the Susan Slide, the Bari traces clean lines along the foot in plongé nappa mignons. A welted leather fussbett sole completes the design.

products.title: Danielle in Black Suede — Exclusive
products.description: A refined loafer in a classic slip-on style, the Danielle is rendered with a welted sole and designed to last years with proper care. A day-to-night silhouette, the loafer’s neutral suede, and contrasting sole add richness to a grounded ensemble.

products.title: Bari Pool Slide in Black Nappa and Rubber
products.description: A laid-back version of our iconic style, the Bari Pool Slide is crafted with a soft welted rubber sole and nappa mignons that traces elegant lines across the foot. Please note that mignons across the vamp of the foot may initially feel tight and is designed to stretch over time.

products.title: Bari Pool Slide in Beige Nappa and Rubber
products.description: A laid-back version of our iconic style, the Bari Pool Slide is crafted with a soft welted rubber sole and nappa mignons that traces elegant lines across the foot. products.title: Bari in Ivory Plongé Nappa
products.description: Our bestselling Susan Slide reimagined, the Bari traces elegant lines along the foot in thick nappa cording. It is set upon a nappa-covered upper and welted leather fussbett sole that feels sumptuous and comfortable. This sandal is designed with the strap to fit across the vamp of the foot, not around the ankle. It may feel initially tight and will stretch and mold to your feet with wear.

products.title: Cecilia in Cerulean Blue Plongé Nappa
products.description: The Cecilia t-strap sandal slips on and elegantly exposes a nearly nude foot. These refined sandals are finished with an adjustable strap to secure the vamp and heel. These sandals have a lightly padded insole, smooth leather lining, and a leather sole, which will mold to your foot as you wear them.

The delicate single and double bands are inspired by the bestselling Laurie Bijoux sandal and add a subtle shine to any look.

products.title: Ernest in Ivory Calfskin
tags: easy size - custom fit - narrow size down
products.description: This classic caged fisherman style is constructed in smooth calfskin and named with a nod to Hemingway’s Old Man and The Sea . Please note that these shoes are made from vachetta, a vegetable-tanned calfskin leather, and they will need to be broken in on most feet. Over time, this high-quality leather will change its shape and mold to fit your foot for optimal comfort.

products.title: Largo Belt in Chestnut with Silver Buckle — Exclusive
products.description: A wider version of our bestselling Yoyo belt, the Largo belt comes in a classic length for a more tailored fit. Affixed with a gold or silver half buckle, this bold style is a sleek way to cinch a dress, coat, or trousers. This belt is composed of vegetable tanned leather and may have natural markings which are considered part of its unique character.
